system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.sp_tinhluyke_reverse_fast_ngay","body":"CREATE   PROCEDURE dbo.sp_TinhLuyKe_Reverse_Fast_Ngay
    @Nam INT,
    @Thang INT,
    @Loai NVARCHAR(50) = N'LuyKeNgay'
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    SET XACT_ABORT ON;

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 🔧 Khai báo biến
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    DECLARE 
        @NgayHienTai DATE = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE),
        @NamHienTai INT = YEAR(GETDATE()),
        @ThangHienTai INT = MONTH(GETDATE()),
        @StartDate DATE,
        @EndDate DATE,
        @CountDays INT;

    -- ✅ Giới hạn phạm vi tháng
    SET @StartDate = DATEFROMPARTS(@Nam, @Thang, 1);
    SET @EndDate = EOMONTH(@StartDate);

    -- ✅ Nếu là tháng/năm hiện tại → chỉ tính đến ngày hiện tại
    IF @Nam = @NamHienTai AND @Thang = @ThangHienTai
        SET @EndDate = @NgayHienTai;

    -- ✅ Nếu là tháng tương lai → bỏ qua
    IF (@Nam > @NamHienTai) OR (@Nam = @NamHienTai AND @Thang > @ThangHienTai)
    BEGIN
        PRINT CONCAT('❌ Bỏ qua tháng tương lai: ', @Thang, '/', @Nam);
        RETURN;
    END;

    -- ✅ Đảm bảo số ngày > 0
    SET @CountDays = DATEDIFF(DAY, @StartDate, @EndDate) + 1;

    IF @CountDays <= 0
    BEGIN
        PRINT CONCAT('⚠️ Không có ngày hợp lệ trong tháng ', @Thang, '/', @Nam);
        RETURN;
    END;

    PRINT CONCAT('=== BẮT ĐẦU TÍNH LŨY KẾ NGÀY NĂM ', @Nam, ' THÁNG ', @Thang, ' - LOẠI: ', @Loai, ' ===');

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 1️⃣ Danh sách vật tư có tồn kho
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TonKho') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #TonKho;
    SELECT 
        mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS AS mavt,
        SUM(CAST(soluong AS DECIMAL(38,6))) AS slton_thucte
    INTO #TonKho
    FROM tr_tonkho_sum
    GROUP BY mavt;

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 2️⃣ Dữ liệu nhập trong tháng
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Nhap') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Nhap;
    SELECT 
        n.mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS AS mavt,
        CAST(n.ngaynhap AS DATE) AS ngay,
        SUM(CAST(n.slnhap AS DECIMAL(38,6))) AS slnhap,
        SUM(CAST(n.slnhap * n.gianhap AS DECIMAL(38,6))) AS giatri_nhap
    INTO #Nhap
    FROM tr_ctphieunhap n
    INNER JOIN tr_phieunhap pn ON pn.sopn = n.sopn
    INNER JOIN #TonKho tk ON tk.mavt = n.mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
    WHERE pn.active = 1
      AND YEAR(n.ngaynhap) = @Nam
      AND MONTH(n.ngaynhap) = @Thang
      AND n.ngaynhap <= @EndDate
      AND ISNULL(n.gianhap,0) > 0
    GROUP BY n.mavt, CAST(n.ngaynhap AS DATE);

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 3️⃣ Dữ liệu xuất trong tháng
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Xuat') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Xuat;
    SELECT 
        x.mact COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS AS mavt,
        CAST(x.ngaytao AS DATE) AS ngay,
        SUM(CAST(x.soluong AS DECIMAL(38,6))) AS slxuat,
        SUM(CAST(x.soluong * x.giaxuat AS DECIMAL(38,6))) AS giatri_xuat
    INTO #Xuat
    FROM tr_ctphieuxuat x
    INNER JOIN tr_phieuxuat px ON px.sopx = x.phieuxuat
    INNER JOIN #TonKho tk ON tk.mavt = x.mact COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
    WHERE px.active = 1
      AND YEAR(x.ngaytao) = @Nam
      AND MONTH(x.ngaytao) = @Thang
      AND x.ngaytao <= @EndDate
      AND ISNULL(x.giaxuat,0) > 0
    GROUP BY x.mact, CAST(x.ngaytao AS DATE);

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 4️⃣ Sinh danh sách ngày hợp lệ trong tháng
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Ngay') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Ngay;

    ;WITH nums AS (
        SELECT TOP (@CountDays)
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) - 1 AS n
        FROM master..spt_values a CROSS JOIN master..spt_values b
    )
    SELECT DATEADD(DAY, n, @StartDate) AS ngay
    INTO #Ngay
    FROM nums
    ORDER BY ngay;

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 5️⃣ Chuẩn bị dữ liệu nhập xuất theo ngày
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#KetQua') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #KetQua;
    CREATE TABLE #KetQua (
        Id UNIQUEIDENTIFIER,
        loai NVARCHAR(50),
        mavt NVARCHAR(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS,
        ngay DATE,
        sltondau DECIMAL(38,6),
        slnhap DECIMAL(38,6),
        slxuat DECIMAL(38,6),
        sltoncuoi DECIMAL(38,6),
        dgton DECIMAL(38,6),
        taikhoan NVARCHAR(50)
    );

    ;WITH NX AS (
        SELECT
            tk.mavt,
            d.ngay,
            ISNULL(nh.slnhap, 0)      AS slnhap,
            ISNULL(xu.slxuat, 0)      AS slxuat,
            ISNULL(nh.giatri_nhap,0)  AS giatri_nhap,
            ISNULL(xu.giatri_xuat,0)  AS giatri_xuat
        FROM #TonKho tk
        CROSS JOIN #Ngay d
        LEFT JOIN #Nhap nh ON nh.mavt = tk.mavt AND nh.ngay = d.ngay
        LEFT JOIN #Xuat xu ON xu.mavt = tk.mavt AND xu.ngay = d.ngay
    ),
    L1 AS (
        SELECT
            nx.mavt,
            nx.ngay,
            nx.slnhap,
            nx.slxuat,
            nx.giatri_nhap,
            nx.giatri_xuat,
            SUM(CAST(nx.slnhap - nx.slxuat AS DECIMAL(38,6)))
                OVER (PARTITION BY nx.mavt ORDER BY nx.ngay ASC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS cum_net,
            SUM(CAST(nx.slnhap + nx.slxuat AS DECIMAL(38,6)))
                OVER (PARTITION BY nx.mavt ORDER BY nx.ngay ASC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS cum_qty,
            SUM(CAST(nx.giatri_nhap + nx.giatri_xuat AS DECIMAL(38,6)))
                OVER (PARTITION BY nx.mavt ORDER BY nx.ngay ASC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS cum_val
        FROM
-- ... (truncated)","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.l1","dbo.master","dbo.nums","dbo.nx","dbo.tr_ctphieunhap","dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_material_luyke","dbo.tr_phieunhap","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":["dbo.k","dbo.tr_material_luyke"],"flags":["has-cte","has-group-by","has-window","has-temp-table","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
